Event: Royal Challenge - Season 46
Event Date: 01/02/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI298
Iron Fury Ring

Once in a while, the unit deals pure damage equal to 200% of the unit's attack to 2 random enemy units every second for 3 sec. If a target has more than 50% health after the damage was dealt, all of its stats are reduced by 30% for 4 sec. If the target has less than 50% health after the damage was dealt, the target is turned into a rock for 3 sec. For the duration, the target is unable to move, and takes 45% more damage. The target also takes 400000 magic damage every second for the duration. When the effect wears off, the target explodes. The explosion deals 500000 pure damage to the target, and its physical and magic armor are reduced by 20% for 3 sec. 2 nearby enemy units are also hit by rocks. The rocks deal 600000 physical damage on impact and stun the targets for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
